title: taraxacum simulans
intro: Taraxacum simulans, also known as the lesser dandelion or small dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion genus, closely related to the common dandelion (Taraxacum officinale). The medicinal properties of Taraxacum simulans include its high content of vitamins A, C, and E, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to support digestive health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Taraxacum simulans can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
